hook: Little girl excitedly approaches lounging Professor Paws on the sunny couch
joke_setup: A little girl tells Professor Paws he is the king of the house.

dialogue.speaker: little girl
dialogue.line: You are the king of the house!

caption: Professor Paws finally gets the recognition he deserves. 👑 Who's the boss in your house? Comment below!
video_prompt: A 10-second 9:16 vertical animated cartoon in an extremely simple cartoon style with thick black outlines, flat bright colors, cute expressive faces, soft bright background, and Facebook meme aesthetic. No watermark, no logo, no on-screen captions, and no text of any kind except two clean white speech bubbles with black text and pointer tails. Scene: cozy living room with a large soft couch and warm sunlight from a window casting a gentle sunbeam across the cushions. Professor Paws, a lazy orange house cat with three darker stripes on his head, half-closed sleepy green eyes, small round fluffy body, curved striped tail, tiny red bow tie, and an unimpressed smug face, is sprawled regally across the couch in the sunbeam. A cute little cartoon girl with brown pigtails, big sparkling eyes, rosy cheeks, and a happy smile wearing a simple yellow shirt enters from the right and stands beside the couch looking at him with admiration. Over 10 seconds with minimal 2D motion: the girl sways happily and gestures with her hands, Professor Paws slowly blinks once and performs one slow smug flick of his striped tail. At 3 seconds a speech bubble appears above the girl: 'You are the king of the house!'. At 7 seconds a second speech bubble appears near Professor Paws: 'Took you long enough.'. Static camera, clean flat 2D cartoon, slow deliberate lazy motion, no other text or elements.
